summary: Iteration 3 — Full Playwright validation of Aurora case-study integration. All 14 review-request flows pass with 0 console errors and 0 failed network responses. Both /case/finvista and /case/aurora detail pages co-exist, coming-soon fallback at /case/next-gen-institute and /case/somethings-cooking still renders.

section_02_problem.note: Spec said 'Inconsistent UX' — actual data label is 'Inconsistent User Experience' (semantically equivalent, acceptable)

section_06_design_system.note: 8 swatch hex codes + 3 token-table hex codes — within spec

image_health.note: Hero image (04_RBJ_Properties_Weekly.jpg) appears once in hero + once in section-design → 18 tags, 17 unique

critical_code_review_comments: AuroraCaseStudy.jsx is 542 lines — within the 700-line threshold but growing. As more sections/data are added, consider splitting per-section components into separate files for maintainability (same comment applied to FinvistaCaseStudy.jsx in iteration 2).

Spec checklist used the label 'Inconsistent UX' but the source data uses 'Inconsistent User Experience'. Functionally equivalent — flagging for awareness in case the main agent wants strict label parity with the source HTML.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Aurora case study fully integrated alongside FinVista. Both /case/finvista and /case/aurora work as full detail pages. Coming-soon fallback (testid coming-soon-case) still renders for /case/next-gen-institute and /case/somethings-cooking. Key testids on Aurora: aurora-case-study, back-link, case-hero-image, section-overview, section-problem, section-research, section-insights, section-design, section-design-system, section-validation, section-impact, case-cta-email. All 17 /aurora/ assets (11 JPG + 4 wireframe SVG + 2 sketch SVG) load successfully. Page is ~20146 px tall; lazy images must be scrolled into view before assertions.
